parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { 'Timestamp': $json.generated_at, 'Email': $json.email, 'OTP Code': $json.otp, 'OTP Sent At': $json.generated_at, 'Verified At': 'Pending', 'Status': 'Sent', 'Attempts': 0, 'IP Address': '', 'Session ID': $json.session_id, 'Expiry Time': $json.expiry_time, _email: $json.email, _name: $json.name, _otp: $json.otp, _session_id: $json.session_id, _purpose_text: $json.purpose_text, _expiry_minutes: $json.expiry_minutes, _generated_at: $json.generated_at, _expiry_time: $json.expiry_time } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'OTP sent successfully to ' + $json._email, session_id: $json._session_id, expires_in_minutes: 10, hint: 'Check your email inbox and spam folder' }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json._otp + ' is your verification code' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Verification Code

One-time password for ' + $json._purpose_text + '

Hello ' + $json._name + ',

Here is your one-time verification code. This code is valid for ' + $json._expiry_minutes + ' minutes.

Your OTP Code

' + $json._otp + '

Expires in ' + $json._expiry_minutes + ' minutes

Security notice: Never share this code with anyone.

Session ID: ' + $json._session_id + '
Valid until: ' + new Date($json._expiry_time).toLocaleString() + '

This is an automated message. Please do not reply.

' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error, message: 'Please provide a valid email address' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { submitted_otp: String(body.otp || '').trim(), submitted_email: String(body.email || '').trim().toLowerCase(), session_id: String(body.session_id || '').trim() } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: 'OTP session not found. Please request a new OTP.', reason: 'SESSION_NOT_FOUND', session_id: $('Extract Submission').item.json.session_id }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: $json._message, reason: $json._reason, session_id: $json._session_id, token: $json._token || null, verified_at: $json._verified_at || null }) }}

parameters.subject: ✅ Identity Verified Successfully
parameters.message:
={{ '
✅

Verified Successfully!

Your identity has been verified successfully.

✅ Email: ' + $json._email + '

✅ Verified at: ' + new Date($json._verified_at).toLocaleString() + '

' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: $json._message, reason: $json._reason, session_id: $json._session_id, remaining_attempts: $json._remaining || null }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '❌ OTP Verification Failed — ' + $json._reason }}
parameters.message:
={{ '
❌

Verification Failed

' + $json._message + '

' + ($json._remaining > 0 ? '

⚠️ Attempts remaining: ' + $json._remaining + '

' : '

🔒 Please request a new OTP.

') + '

Reason code: ' + $json._reason + '

' }}
